ai-lab.gradientCSS: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, #00E5A008 0%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 80%, #00D4FF06 0%, transparent 50%)

wild-west.gradientCSS: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, #D4A57408 0%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 80%, #C8753306 0%, transparent 50%)

space-station.gradientCSS: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, #A855F708 0%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 80%, #3B82F606 0%, transparent 50%)

retro-arcade.gradientCSS: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, #FF6EC708 0%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 80%, #FFFF0006 0%, transparent 50%)
